Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Lorraine Dakanay. Attorney Bill Ford appearing for the Plaintiff.
Defendant Miguel Brizuela is present.
Attorney Kelly McCoy representing the defendant through limited scope.

Counsel and litigants confer in D501.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of MAR-19-2012 is vacated.
